$comment: Pinned SurrealDB binary release. Bumped manually when kongcode is tested against a newer SurrealDB version. Per-platform sha256 verified against the GitHub release artifact.

embeddingModel.$comment: BGE-M3 GGUF Q4_K_M. Single download for all platforms (model file is portable). 420MB.
embeddingModel.name: bge-m3-Q4_K_M.gguf

rerankerModel.$comment: bge-reranker-v2-m3 GGUF Q8_0. Cross-encoder reranker for two-stage retrieve-then-rerank. ~606MB. Optional — when absent, recall falls back to WMR/ACAN scoring. Same configuration that hit 98.2% R@5 on LongMemEval in kongclaw.
rerankerModel.name: bge-reranker-v2-m3-Q8_0.gguf

nodeLlamaCpp.$comment: node-llama-cpp main package + per-platform native binding. Downloaded by bootstrap on first run when running under SEA (no node_modules available). Each <platform> tarball goes to <cache>/native/node_modules/@node-llama-cpp/<platform>/ so Node's normal module resolution finds it from <cache>/native/node-llama-cpp/.

ajv.$comment: ajv + ajv-formats are imported via createRequire/dynamic require by @modelcontextprotocol/sdk for JSON schema validation. esbuild can't statically resolve those calls under --bundle, so under SEA the bundled JS would fail with MODULE_NOT_FOUND on first tools/list call. Bootstrap downloads both into <cache>/native/node_modules/ at first run and prepends that dir to NODE_PATH before the bundled MCP client runs — Node's module resolution then finds them via the standard walk-up.
